summary: Expanded tokens.css with semantic severity colors (success/warning/danger), shadow tokens (sm/md), border-radius tokens (sm/md/lg), transition tokens (fast/base), spacing-3xl, font-size-xs/2xl, font-weight (normal/medium/bold), line-height (tight/base/relaxed), and letter-spacing (tight/wide). Created card.css with .card class using design tokens for background, border, radius, shadow, and padding. Created button.css with .btn base class, .btn-primary and .btn-secondary variants, plus hover, focus-visible, and disabled states. Updated global.css to import both new stylesheets and added h1-h4 heading styles using typography tokens. All 173 tests pass including 42 new US-005 tests.
